| 27468 | `1.3.6.1.4.1.3902.1012.3.32.1.1.4.268568320` | _belum diketahui_ | 40 | `0` |

---

## 🚀 Ringkasan OID Penting untuk Development (Go/Python)

Berikut adalah OID yang paling sering digunakan dalam pengembangan monitoring OLT:

| Fungsi | OID | Keterangan |
|---|---|---|
| Hostname OLT | `1.3.6.1.2.1.1.5.0` | sysName |
| Uptime OLT | `1.3.6.1.2.1.1.3.0` | sysUpTime (ticks/100 = detik) |
| Deskripsi OLT | `1.3.6.1.2.1.1.1.0` | sysDescr - versi firmware |
| Nama Interface | `1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.1` | ifName |
| Status Interface | `1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.8` | ifOperStatus (1=up, 2=down) |
| Traffic Masuk | `1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.6` | ifHCInOctets (64-bit counter) |
| Traffic Keluar | `1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.10` | ifHCOutOctets (64-bit counter) |
| Nama VLAN | `1.3.6.1.2.1.17.7.1.4.3.1.1` | dot1qVlanStaticName |
| Tipe ONU | `1.3.6.1.4.1.3902.1015.1010.11.2.1.1` | zxAnGponOnuType |
| Nama ONU | `1.3.6.1.4.1.3902.1015.1010.11.2.1.2` | zxAnGponOnuName |
| SN ONU | `1.3.6.1.4.1.3902.1015.1010.11.2.1.3` | zxAnGponOnuSn |
| Status ONU | `1.3.6.1.4.1.3902.1015.1010.11.2.1.5` | 1=Online, 2=Offline |
| Jarak ONU | `1.3.6.1.4.1.3902.1015.1010.11.2.1.6` | Jarak dalam meter |
| Rx Power ONU | `1.3.6.1.4.1.3902.1015.1011.2.1.1.2` | dBm x 100 |
| Tx Power ONU | `1.3.6.1.4.1.3902.1015.1011.2.1.1.3` | dBm x 100 |
| PVID ONU | `1.3.6.1.4.1.3902.1015.1010.11.2.1.8` | VLAN PVID |
| Service Port VLAN | `1.3.6.1.4.1.3902.1082.40.10.1.1.2` | C-VLAN |
| Service Port SVLAN | `1.3.6.1.4.1.3902.1082.40.10.1.1.4` | S-VLAN |

> **Catatan Konversi Redaman:**
> Nilai Rx/Tx Power dari SNMP biasanya dalam satuan `dBm x 100`.
> Contoh: value `2145` berarti `-21.45 dBm`.
> Formula: `dBm = (value - 10000) / 100` atau tergantung firmware.
